args.code: (async()=>{await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1200)); const inputs=[...document.querySelectorAll('input')]; const q=inputs.find(i=>!i.disabled&&['text','search',''].includes(i.type)); if(q){q.focus(); q.value='B0CZ7F61XN'; q.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); q.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));} const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(n=>/搜索/.test((n.innerText||n.textContent||'').trim())); if(b)b.click(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1800)); const link=[...document.querySelectorAll('a')].find(a=>(a.href||'').includes('B0CZ7F61XN')); const out={found:!!link,url:location.href}; if(link){let n=link; out.chain=[]; for(let i=0;i<14&&n;i++,n=n.parentElement){const txt=(n.innerText||n.textContent||'').replace(/s+/g,' ').trim(); const html=n.outerHTML||''; out.chain.push({i,tag:n.tagName,cls:n.className,text:txt.slice(0,900),hasEdit:/编辑/.test(txt),ids:[...html.matchAll(/1674877820[0-9]+/g)].map(m=>m[0]).slice(0,10),links:[...n.querySelectorAll('a')].map(a=>({t:(a.innerText||a.textContent||'').trim(),href:a.href})).filter(x=>/edit|B0CZ7F61XN/.test(x.href)||x.t==='编辑').slice(0,10)});}} return JSON.stringify(out);})()
